## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 130, Safari 18]
- **Deployment**: [Docker / Local]
- **Comic Source**: [e.g., asura, mangadex]

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (logs, screenshots, etc.).
